person.name: Theodore I Laskaris
person.alternateName: Theodoros I Emperor of the Byzantine Empire and Nicea

popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  Emperor (Basilius) of the East, 1204; Basileus of Nicea, 1206; Despot, 1197.  Expelled by the Latins.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/NIKAIA.htm#TheodorosINikaiadied1222B as of 6/12/201 …

sourceList.title: Legacy NFS Source: Theodoros II Dukas Guillaume - Published information: death: ; France
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - THEODOROS Komnenos Laskaris, son of --- Laskaris & his wife --- ([1171/74]-Nov 1221, bur monastery of Hyakinthos).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Theodore I Laskaris於1171年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾時，他的父親Manuel Laskaris32歲，母親Ioanna Karatzaina23歲。他於1199年2月與Anna Komnene Bizánci hercegnő Angelos-házi在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1221年11月在土耳其布爾薩易茲尼可享年50歲，埋葬在土耳其布爾薩易茲尼可易茲尼可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theodore I Laskaris于1171年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾时，他的父亲Manuel Laskaris32岁，母亲Ioanna Karatzaina23岁。他于1199年2月与Anna Komnene Bizánci hercegnő Angelos-házi在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1221年11月在土耳其布爾薩易茲尼可享年50岁，埋葬在土耳其布爾薩易茲尼可易茲尼可。

nameMeanings.name: Laskaris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Demetrios, Dimitrios, Panos.
Greek: occupational name from a Hellenized form of Persian lashkarī ‘soldier’.

variants.name: Laskos
meanings: nickname for a work-weary person, from laskos, from Italian lasco ‘loose’, Sicilian dialect lascu ‘sluggish, work-weary, miserable’.
from the personal name Laskos, a pet form of the name Laskaris (see Laskaris ). Compare Lasko 4.

nameMeanings.name: Theodore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the French form of the Greek name Theodōros, derived from theos ‘god’ + dōron ‘gift’. The name was popular among early Christians and was borne by several saints.

en.lifeSummary: When Theodore I Laskaris was born in 1171, in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkiye, his father, Manuel Laskaris, was 32 and his mother, Ioanna Karatzaina, was 23. He married Anna Komnene Bizánci hercegnő Angelos-házi in February 1199, in İstanbul, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in November 1221, in İznik, Bursa, Türkiye, at the age of 50, and was buried in İznik, İznik, Bursa, Türkiye.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theodore I Laskaris est né en 1171, à Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Manuel Laskaris, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ioanna Karatzaina, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anna Komnene Bizánci hercegnő Angelos-házi en février 1199, à İstanbul, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en novembre 1221, à İznik, Bursa, Turquie, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à İznik, İznik, Bursa, Turquie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theodore I Laskaris 1171 in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war sein Vater Manuel Laskaris 32 und seine Mutter Ioanna Karatzaina 23. Er hat im Februar 1199 in İstanbul, Türkei Anna Komnene Bizánci hercegnő Angelos-házi geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im November 1221 im Alter von 50 Jahren in İznik, Bursa, Türkei und wurde in İznik, İznik, Bursa, Türkei begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theodore I Laskaris è nato il nel 1171 nel Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turchia, il suo padre, Manuel Laskaris, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Ioanna Karatzaina, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anna Komnene Bizánci hercegnő Angelos-házi nel febbraio 1199, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1221, nel İznik, Bursa, Turchia, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a İznik, İznik, Bursa, Turchia.

ja.Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル

ja.Byzantium (Constantinople), Istanbul, Tu: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル
ja.lifeSummary: Theodore I Laskarisが1171年にトルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Manuel Laskarisは32歳，母Ioanna Karatzainaは23歳であった。1199年2月にトルコイスタンブルでAnna Komnene Bizánci hercegnő Angelos-háziと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1221年11月にトルコブルサイズニクで50歳で死去し，トルコブルサイズニクイズニクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Theodore I Laskaris(이)가 1171년 튀르키예 이스탠불 팻이h 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Manuel Laskaris(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ioanna Karatzaina(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1199년 2월 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Anna Komnene Bizánci hercegnő Angelos-házi(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1221년 11월 튀르키예 버사 이즈닉에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 튀르키예 버사 이즈닉 이즈닉에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theodore I Laskaris nasceu em 1171, em Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Manuel Laskaris, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ioanna Karatzaina, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Komnene Bizánci hercegnő Angelos-házi em fevereiro de 1199, em İstanbul, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1221, em İznik, Bursa, Turquia, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em İznik, İznik, Bursa, Turquia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theodore I Laskaris родился в 1171 г. в местности истанбул, фатих, истанбул, Турция, его отцу по имени Manuel Laskaris было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ioanna Karatzaina, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Komnene Bizánci hercegnő Angelos-házi февраль 1199 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер ноябрь 1221 г. в местности изник, бурса, Турция в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности изник, изник, бурса, Турция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theodore I Laskaris nació en 1171, en Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Manuel Laskaris, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ioanna Karatzaina, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anna Komnene Bizánci hercegnő Angelos-házi en febrero de 1199, en İstanbul, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1221, en İznik, Bursa, Turquía, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en İznik, İznik, Bursa, Turquía.
